mapper.select: select ROLE_ID, ROLEAUTH.AUTH_ID, ROLEAUTH.UPDATE_TIME, ROLEAUTH.UPDATE_BY, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD1, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD2, ROLEAUTH.RESERVED_FIELD3 from TBL_ROLE_AUTH ROLEAUTH LEFT JOIN TBL_AUTH AUTH ON AUTH.AUTH_ID = ROLEAUTH.AUTH_ID where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND AUTH.IS_AVAILABLE = 'Y'
